response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is primarily in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS, but no evidence of 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: Absence of AI accelerator or GPU optimization background
